name: Fero
description: Fero (real name Feronit Shabani) is a Kosovan Albanian rapper, singer, and songwriter, born on 8 July 1997 in Germany and raised in Gjilan, Kosovo. He began his music career in 2016, gained popularity in the Albanian music scene with several singles like "Jom rrit" and "Habibi", and was associated with labels such as On Records before starting his own projects. He has also taken breaks from music, and later returned to making music under management. He is known both for his music and his public life.
